construction_strategy: Create a rounded back plate, cut two symmetric mounting holes, then cut a centered relief opening.

steps.reason: The back plate is the wall mounting datum and the rounded profile is robust under size edits.
The bracket must mount to a wall with two symmetric editable screw holes.
The centered cutout creates an editable relief feature without changing the mounting datum.

assumptions: The mounting holes and center cutout are centered on the plate.
unknowns: No load-bearing arm or gusset feature is added until load requirements are known.

mounting_holes.reason: Example prompt includes two symmetric mounting holes.

center_cutout.reason: Example prompt includes a centered rectangular cutout.

rounded_corners.reason: Bundled example uses rounded corners as a documented default style.

edge_fillets.reason: Edge fillets are omitted unless explicitly requested.
